METLOCK

A Missouri-Miners iGEM 2025 project focused on programmable zinc capture, computational design support, and environmentally responsible recovery workflows.

Home Project Description Software Human Practices

Wiki Scope

Built as a structured scientific record for design, testing, modeling, outreach, and documentation across the 2025 competition season.

Repository
